task: Find a walkthrough for the game "The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild" on ign.
graderReasoning: The agent reached the correct IGN walkthrough page for The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild. Evidence: final page title was 'Walkthrough - The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild Guide - IGN' at URL https://www.ign.com/wikis/the-legend-of-zelda-breath-of-the-wild/Walkthrough, and the page content showed walkthrough sections such as The Shrine of Resurrection, The Isolated Plateau, Divine Beast Vah Ruta, The Hero's Sword, and Destroy Ganon. The final response provided the correct walkthrough link.
final_result_response:
Found it on IGN:

https://www.ign.com/wikis/the-legend-of-zelda-breath-of-the-wild/Walkthrough

It’s the “Walkthrough - The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild Guide” page, with main quest sections like The Shrine of Resurrection, The Isolated Plateau, Divine Beasts, The Hero’s Sword, and Destroy Ganon.
action_history: Opening IGN: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.ign.com/');
Entering game search: await page.locator('e133').fill('The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild');
Opening the game page: await page.locator('e136').click();
